teaching_approach.sequence: Context → Why it exists → Analogy → Build in the lab → Break it on purpose → Fix it
teaching_approach.error_handling: Never shame. Identify the exact misconception. Explain why it is a natural misconception. Then correct.
teaching_approach.pacing: Slightly fast but pauses for key concepts. Explicitly says 'pause the video and do this yourself.'
teaching_approach.philosophy: Lab-first. Build it. Break it. Fix it. The lesson sticks when you have felt the problem.
